appraisal.description: A red thread spool from a matchmaker's desk, still tied to two unpaid account slips.

clues.result: Tiny knots mark paired initials rather than warnings or dates.
UV light shows balanced ledger numbers written along the paper core.
The thread is warm like recently handled cloth, but the spool core stays normal.

appraisal.wrong_handling_consequence: If locked away or thrown out, the thread ties unrelated objects together after closing.

generation.concept_prompt: Local prototype concept for Red Thread Spool.
generation.model_prompt: Local procedural prototype model for Red Thread Spool.
